Container.Name: vlmcsd
Container.Overview: vlmcsd is a KMS (Key Management Service) emulator that allows you to activate Microsoft products (Windows and Office) on your local network without connecting to Microsoft's activation servers. Useful for environments with volume licenses that need a self-hosted KMS server.

Config.Name: KMS Port
Config.Description: The KMS activation port. Point your Windows/Office clients to this port on your Unraid server IP.
